title: Vanilla Home Teleport
description: A lightweight datapack that adds personal /sethome and /home to vanilla Minecraft using /trigger, no plugins and no mods required.
body:
## Features
- One personal home per player
- Saves position + facing direction (yaw/pitch)
- Works on servers and singleplayer
- Minimal, low-overhead implementation (marker armor stands)
- Compatible with many Minecraft versions (datapack format range via supported_formats)

## Commands
/trigger sethome — set your home at your current position
/trigger home — teleport to your home

## Installation
Put the zip into: world/datapacks/
Run /reload
(Optional) '/datapack list' to verify it’s enabled

_Note
Minecraft shows a small system message after /trigger (“Triggered ...”). This is vanilla behavior._
